seo.title: TikTok Fashion Haul Video Generator | AI Influencer-Style Ads
seo.description: Create TikTok-style fashion haul videos with AI influencers. Turn product images into creator-style try-on clips for social commerce and paid campaigns.

hero.title: TikTok Fashion Haul
hero.description: Create TikTok-ready fashion haul content with AI influencer presentation. Convert product visuals into natural try-on style short videos built for social engagement, creator commerce, and ad testing.

steps.title: Upload your fashion products
steps.description: Provide images of your clothing items, accessories, or fashion products. The AI will prepare them for dynamic haul-style video presentation.

steps.title: Select haul style and format
steps.description: Choose your video style—quick transitions, try-on reveals, outfit showcases, or trend-driven formats that resonate with TikTok and social media audiences.

steps.title: AI generates haul video
steps.description: Using Nano Banana Pro and VEO 3.1, create authentic influencer-style fashion haul videos with engaging transitions, styling, and TikTok-native aesthetics.

steps.title: Export for social media
steps.description: Download vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts—ready to post and drive engagement with your fashion products.

whoIsFor.title: Perfect for fashion brands and social media marketers
whoIsFor.subtitle: From boutiques to major brands, see who creates fashion haul content with AI.

items.question: What is TikTok Fashion Haul?
items.answer: This AI workflow creates influencer-style fashion haul videos optimized for TikTok and social media. It generates authentic try-on content that showcases your fashion products in engaging, trend-driven formats.

items.question: What types of fashion products work best?
items.answer: All fashion items work well: clothing, shoes, bags, accessories, jewelry, and complete outfits. The workflow adapts to showcase each product type in the most engaging haul format.

items.question: What video formats are generated?
items.answer: Videos are optimized for vertical social media: 9:16 aspect ratio perfect for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts with platform-native aesthetics and pacing.

items.question: Can I customize the haul style?
items.answer: Yes. Choose from various styles including quick transitions, detailed try-ons, outfit reveals, styling tips, and trend-based formats that match your brand and audience.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for product imagery and VEO 3.1 for dynamic video generation with authentic influencer-style motion and transitions.

items.question: How do credits work for video generation?
items.answer: Video generation consumes credits based on duration and complexity. The workflow is optimized for social media-length content that maximizes engagement value.
